concerns.text: FR-004 requires fitting MLR/LASSO with pH/Temp as covariates if ≥50% data exists. Tasks T021/T023 only implement stratification/exclusion. No task covers the covariate modeling path required by FR-004.

FR-009 mandates normalizing rates to standard conditions (25°C, pH 7.4) via Arrhenius if data exists. Tasks T020/T021 explicitly forbid Arrhenius normalization and only exclude non-standard records. No task implements the normalization logic required by FR-009.

Assumption 'Threshold Justification' requires a sensitivity analysis sweeping correlation thresholds over {0.4, 0.5, 0.6}. No task exists to implement this sweep; T022 only implements the fixed 0.5 threshold.

SC-003 and SC-004 require measuring p-values against specific thresholds (p<0.05) and validating model assumptions. Tasks T022/T025 implement the calculations but lack a specific verification task to assert the output meets these success criteria.

Duplicate Task ID T024: Used for 'Integration test for report generation' in Phase 5 Tests, but T024 is already used for 'LASSO regression' in Phase 4 Implementation. This causes ambiguity in task tracking.
Duplicate Task ID T026: Used for 'Save analysis results' in Phase 4 Implementation, but T026 is also used for 'Implement viz.py' in Phase 5 Implementation. This causes ambiguity in task tracking.
